/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libgit-wrapper.so -o libgit-wrapper.so "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/Git.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitAdminDir.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitDataObject.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitFolderStatus.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitIndex.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitMailmap.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitPatch.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitRev.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitRevLoglist.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitRevRefBrowser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitStatus.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/GitStatusListCtrl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/MassiveGitTaskBase.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/git-wrapper.dir/TGitPath.cpp.o"
